title: Emerald Nights
description: Emerald Nights is a dark fantasy adventure modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 with enhanced worldgen, challenging dungeons, refined combat, and shader support optimized for performance with 200+ mods.
body:
![Emerald Nights Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a28f9dc8a6016607a89cedfb0763b54740a1c36.png)

--- # 🌙 Emerald Nights v1.0.2 ## *A Dark Fantasy Adventure Awaits* ### **✨ Good With Friends ✨** Emerald Nights transforms Minecraft into an **immersive dark fantasy adventure** with over **200 carefully curated mods**. Venture through dramatically overhauled worlds, conquer challenging dungeons, and master refined combat in a beautifully enhanced environment. --- ## 📖 **What is Emerald Nights?**
**Emerald Nights** is a **dark fantasy modpack** that reimagines Minecraft as an epic adventure RPG. With enhanced combat systems, breathtaking world generation, challenging dungeons, and stunning visual overhauls, every moment feels like stepping into a fantasy epic. **Perfect for solo adventurers or cooperative play with friends.**
--- ## ⚔️ **CORE FEATURES** --- ### 🌍 **ENHANCED WORLD GENERATION**
**Experience breathtaking terrain generation** that transforms every biome into a work of art. 🔹 **Terralith** - Over 100 new biomes with stunning landscapes 🔹 **Incendium** - Complete Nether overhaul with new structures 🔹 **Nullscape** - Reimagined End dimension 🔹 **Tectonic** - Realistic terrain generation *From towering mountain ranges to mysterious dark forests, every world is unique.*
--- ### 🏰 **STRUCTURES & DUNGEONS**
**Hundreds of new structures** await discovery across all dimensions. 🏯 **Cherry Samurai Temples** - Eastern-inspired architecture 🏛️ **Enhanced Villages** - Populated with Guard Villagers ⚔️ **Reworked Dungeons** - Strongholds, Ancient Cities, Pillager Outposts 🗺️ **Towns and Towers** - Massive settlement structures 🌊 **Tidal Towns** - Coastal villages and harbors *Each structure tells a story and offers unique rewards.*
--- ### ⚔️ **REFINED COMBAT SYSTEM**
**Master an enhanced combat experience** with new mechanics and weapons. ⚡ **Better Combat** - Improved attack animations and hitboxes 🤸 **Combat Roll** - Dodge enemy attacks with rolls 🗡️ **Simply Swords** - Dozens of unique weapon types 🛡️ **Armor of the Ages** - Historical armor sets with unique abilities 🎯 **Weapon Master** - Expanded weapon variety *Combat feels responsive, challenging, and rewarding.*
--- ### 👾 **CHALLENGING ENEMIES**
**Face dangerous new threats** in your adventures. 💀 **AdventureZ** - New bosses and mini-bosses 🕷️ **Enhanced Mobs** - Smarter, more challenging creatures 🌑 **Deeper and Darker** - Venture into the ancient depths 🎵 **Boss Music** - Dynamic soundtracks during boss fights 📊 **Mini Boss Bars** - Track multiple boss health bars *Every encounter tests your skills and preparation.*
--- ### 🎨 **STUNNING VISUALS**
**Breathtaking graphics** powered by cutting-edge optimization. ✨ **Iris Shaders** - Full shader support ⚡ **Sodium** - Performance-optimized rendering 🎭 **Legendary Tooltips** - Beautiful item descriptions 🎪 **Animated Doors** - Immersive door animations 🌧️ **Particle Rain** - Enhanced weather effects 💎 **Better Trims** - Expanded armor customization *Beauty and performance in perfect harmony.*
--- ### ⚡ **OPTIMIZED PERFORMANCE**
**Runs smoothly on both budget and high-end PCs.** 🚀 **C2ME** - Concurrent chunk loading 💾 **FerriteCore** - Memory optimization 🔧 **ModernFix** - General performance fixes ⚡ **ImmediatelyFast** - Rendering improvements 🎯 **Entity Culling** - Smart entity rendering *Experience 60+ FPS without sacrificing content.*
--- ### 🛠️ **QUALITY OF LIFE**
**Dozens of conveniences** make gameplay smoother. 🗺️ **Xaero's Minimap & World Map** - Never get lost 📜 **Better Advancements** - Enhanced progression tracking 📦 **Sophisticated Backpacks** - Expanded inventory 👁️ **Shoulder Surfing** - Enhanced third-person camera 🍎 **AppleSkin** - Food value information 🔍 **JEI** - Recipe lookup system *Focus on adventure, not frustration.*
--- ## 📊 **PACK SPECIFICATIONS**
| **Specification** | **Details** | |------------------|-------------| | 📦 **Total Mods** | 212 | | 🎮 **Minecraft Version** | 1.20.1 (Fabric) | | 💾 **Recommended RAM** | 6-8GB | | 🎨 **Theme** | Dark Fantasy Adventure | | ⚔️ **Difficulty** | Enhanced Challenge | | 👥 **Multiplayer** | Fully Supported | | 🖼️ **Shader Support** | ✅ Iris Compatible | | 🌍 **Server Hosting** | ✅ Optimized |
--- ## 🎯 **PERFECT FOR PLAYERS WHO WANT...**
✅ **Enhanced exploration** with beautiful world generation ✅ **Challenging combat** that rewards skill ✅ **Cooperative gameplay** with friends ✅ **Stunning visuals** with shader support ✅ **Smooth performance** on various hardware ✅ **Deep content** without overwhelming complexity
---

Beekeeper Hut - Better Village - Cherry Villages - Cherry Samurai Temple - Dungeons and Taverns: Ancient City Overhaul - Dungeons and Taverns: Pillager Outpost Rework - Dungeons and Taverns: Stronghold Rework - Dungeons and Taverns: Swamp Hut Rework - Explorify - Guard Villagers - Moog's Structure Library - Moog's Voyager Structures - Philip's Ruins - Tidal Towns - Towns and Towers - Villager Hats ## ⚔️ Combat & Weapons (7) - Better Combat - Blossom Blade - Combat Roll - More Swords Legacy - Simply Swords - Weapon Master YDM - Weapons Expanded ## 🛡️ Armor & Defense (6) - Armor of the Ages - Better Trims - Elytra Trims - Fabric Shield Library - Simple Armor HUD - Tool Trims ## 👾 Mobs & Bosses (6) - AdventureZ - Boss Music Mod - Deeper and Darker - Mini Boss Bars - More Mobs - Smart Brain Library ## 🏡 Building & Decoration (3) - Animated Doors - Yung's API - Yung's Better End Island - Zoomify

🔌 COMPATIBLE MODS & EXPANSIONS (Click to Expand)
**These mods are NOT included but are VERIFIED COMPATIBLE with Fabric 1.20.1:** ⚠️ **IMPORTANT:** This list has been carefully verified. All mods below work with Fabric 1.20.1. --- ### 🎭 **RPG & Character Systems** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Origins** - Choose unique character races (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Extra Origins** - Additional origin options (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Medieval Origins** - Fantasy-themed origins (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **PlayerEx: Director's Cut** - Advanced RPG attributes (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **LevelZ** - Skill-based leveling system (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **RpgZ** - RPG progression mechanics (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🎯 **Magic & Spells** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Spell Engine** - Magic framework (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Spell Power Attributes** - Scaling magic (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Wizards (RPG Series)** - Wizard class (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Spellblades & Sorcerers** - Hybrid magic/melee (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Paladins & Priests** - Holy warrior class (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Archers** - Enhanced ranged combat (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Amethyst Imbuement** - Crystal magic (✅ Fabric)
--- ### ⚔️ **Combat & Weapons** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Mythic Metals** - New ore sets (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **MC Dungeons Weapons** - Dungeons weapons (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **MC Dungeons Armors** - Dungeons armors (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Bosses of Mass Destruction** - Epic bosses (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Marium's Soulslike Weaponry** - Dark Souls weapons (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🗺️ **Exploration & Structures** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **YUNG's Better Nether Fortresses** - Enhanced structures (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **YUNG's Better Desert Temples** - Improved temples (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **YUNG's Better Witch Huts** - Enhanced huts (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **When Dungeons Arise** - Massive dungeons (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Repurposed Structures** - Structure variants (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Dungeon Crawl** - Underground dungeons (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🏰 **Building & Decoration** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Macaw's Mods** - Roofs, Bridges, Doors, Windows (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Chipped** - Block variations (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Supplementaries** - Functional decorations (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Handcrafted** - Furniture (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Adorn** - Additional furniture (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🎒 **Inventory & Storage** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Lootr** - Individual loot per player (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Iron Chests** - Upgraded storage (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Storage Drawers** - Compact storage (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Tom's Simple Storage** - Simple storage network (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🍲 **Food & Survival** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Croptopia** - 250+ crops (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Spice of Life: Carrot Edition** - Dietary variety (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Let's Do: Candlelight** - Fancy dining (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Let's Do: Bakery** - Baking (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Let's Do: Vinery** - Wine making (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🎨 **Visual Enhancements** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Fresh Animations** - Animated mobs (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Better Third Person** - Enhanced camera (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **First-person Model** - See your body (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Not Enough Animations** - More animations (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Visuality** - Particle effects (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Effective** - Enhanced effects (✅ Fabric)
--- ### 🔧 **Utility Mods** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Roughly Enough Items (REI)** - Recipe viewer (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Jade** - Advanced WAILA (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Inventory Profiles Next** - Inventory sorting (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **TrashSlot** - Delete items (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **FTB Quests** - Quest system (✅ Fabric)
--- ### ⚙️ **Performance** (Fabric 1.20.1 ✅)
🔹 **Distant Horizons** - Extended render distance (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Noisium** - World generation performance (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **ServerCore** - Server optimizations (✅ Fabric) 🔹 **Debugify** - Bug fixes (✅ Fabric)
--- ### ❌ **NOT COMPATIBLE - Forge Only:** **These popular mods DO NOT work with Fabric 1.20.1:** - ❌ **Alex's Mobs** (Forge only) - ❌ **Twilight Forest** (Forge only for 1.20.1) - ❌ **Blue Skies** (Forge only) - ❌ **The Undergarden** (Forge only) - ❌ **Epic Fight** (Forge only) - ❌ **Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks** (Forge only) - ❌ **Applied Energistics 2** (Requires Fabric 1.20.4+) - ❌ **Refined Storage** (Forge only) - ❌ **Pam's HarvestCraft** (Forge only for 1.20.1) --- ### 📝 **How to Add Mods:** 1. Download from [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com) (recommended) 2. Check it says **"Fabric 1.20.1"** in compatibility 3. Place `.jar` in `.minecraft/mods` folder 4. Launch and verify 5. Always backup worlds first!
--- ## 📥 **INSTALLATION GUIDE** ### **Step 1: Choose Your Launcher**
| **Launcher** | **Difficulty** | **Recommendation** | |-------------|---------------|-------------------| | 🎮 **Prism Launcher** | ⭐ Easy | ✅ **Recommended** | | 🎯 **Modrinth App** | ⭐ Easy | ✅ **Recommended** | | 🎪 **ATLauncher** | ⭐⭐ Medium | ✅ Good Choice | | 🎨 **MultiMC** | ⭐⭐ Medium | ✅ Good Choice | | 🔮 **CurseForge** | ⭐⭐ Medium | ⚠️ Works Well |
### **Step 2: Download & Install** 1. Click **Download** on this page 2. Open your launcher 3. Click **Import Modpack** 4. Select the downloaded `.mrpack` file 5. Wait for installation to complete ### **Step 3: Configure Settings** ⚙️ **Allocate 6-8GB RAM** in launcher settings 🎮 **Set render distance** to 12-16 chunks 🖼️ **Enable shaders** (optional) via Video Settings ⚡ **Enable VSync** if experiencing screen tearing ### **Step 4: Launch & Play!** 🎉 **You're ready to begin your dark fantasy adventure!** --- ## 🐛 **SUPPORT & COMMUNITY** ### **Need Help?** **Join our Discord** for support, updates, and community discussions! **Report bugs** on the Issues page with details and screenshots.

--- ## 🌟 **SERVER HOSTING**
**Want to play with friends? Host an Emerald Nights server!** ✅ Fully optimized for multiplayer ✅ Supports 10+ players smoothly ✅ All features work in multiplayer ✅ No extra configuration needed **Recommended Hosting:** Use 4-6GB RAM for 5-10 players Use 8GB+ RAM for 10+ players --- ### 📺 **Server Setup Tutorial** Need help setting up a server? Watch this guide: 🎥 **[How to Setup a Modded Minecraft Server](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6zA8EZZLXWw)**
--- ## 💚 **THANK YOU!**
**A massive thank you to everyone who has downloaded, played, and supported Emerald Nights!** Your feedback, bug reports, and suggestions help make this modpack better with every update. Special thanks to all the mod developers whose incredible work makes this pack possible. --- **Created with ❤️ for the Minecraft community** *Emerald Nights - Where darkness meets adventure* 🌙⚔️ visit the wiki: https://emeraldnights.netlify.app --- **Latest Version:** v1.0.2 | **Game Version:** 1.20.1 (Fabric) **Total Mods:** 212 | **RAM:** 6-8GB | **Theme:** Dark Fantasy
